description: Low-pressure turbine rotor blade manufactured from directionally solidified nickel superalloy for CF6-80C2 engines. Designed to withstand continuous operating temperatures up to 1650Â°F with thermal barrier coating.
High-pressure turbine first-stage rotor blade for JT8D-217 engine series, single-crystal superalloy construction with internal cooling passages. Certified to FAA and EASA airworthiness standards.

High-pressure turbine nozzle guide vane assembly for Rolls-Royce Trent 700 series engines, constructed from advanced ceramic matrix composite with platinum aluminide coating. Provides aerodynamic gas path optimization.
Fuel control unit for Honeywell GTCP131-9A auxiliary power unit, featuring dual-redundant servo valve and electronic trim capability. Certified for commercial and military aviation applications.

Angular contact ball bearing assembly for main rotor gearbox applications, manufactured to ABEC-7 tolerances with corrosion-resistant steel races. Suitable for high-speed, high-load rotary applications in aerospace drivetrains.
Boeing 737 Classic fuselage skin panel section, 2024-T3 aluminum alloy, forward lower section. Pre-formed and pre-drilled to OEM specifications for direct installation without further machining.

Main landing gear retraction actuator for C-17 Globemaster III, dual-action hydraulic cylinder with integrated position sensing. Operates at 3,000 psi system pressure with emergency pneumatic backup capability.
AN3 aircraft-grade hex nut cadmium-plated steel, package of 100 units per MIL-N-25027 specification. Suitable for use with AN3 bolt series in primary and secondary aircraft structures.
shortDescription: AN3 Hex Nut Cadmium Plated (100 pk)

description: Static inverter converting 28 VDC aircraft bus power to 115 VAC 400 Hz single-phase output for avionics and cabin equipment. Features built-in EMI filtering and short-circuit protection.
Nose landing gear oleo strut assembly for Boeing 747-400, complete with chrome-plated outer cylinder and seals. Overhaul certified to Boeing SRM and CMM specifications with 8-year service life.
Identification friend-or-foe transponder unit for Patriot missile system ground installations, dual-band operation with encrypted waveform capability. MIL-STD-1553 data bus compatible.
Power conditioning unit for BAE Systems electronic warfare pod, converts aircraft 115 VAC to regulated DC outputs for sensitive EW electronics. Includes EMI hardening to MIL-STD-461.
Cylindrical roller bearing for Moog flight control actuator gearbox, high-load capacity design with machined brass cage. Rated for 50,000 lb radial load capacity in extreme temperature environments.
shortDescription: Cylindrical Roller Bearing Flight Control GBX

description: Airbus A320 trailing edge flap track assembly, manufactured from 7050-T7451 aluminum alloy with hard-anodize finish. Complete assembly includes roller carriages and attachment fittings.
shortDescription: A320 Trailing Edge Flap Track Assembly

description: Engine oil pump assembly for F100-PW-229 turbofan engine, gear-type positive displacement design with relief valve. Provides lubrication to main shaft bearings, gearbox, and accessory drives.

Exhaust gas temperature thermocouple sensor for Honeywell 331-200 APU, chromel-alumel type K construction with stainless steel sheath. Provides accurate temperature monitoring for APU health management.
MS21047 plate nut, two-lug floating, nutplate assembly for access panel attachment in aluminum structure. Per MIL-N-25027 specification, cadmium plated for corrosion resistance.
Compressor stage seal ring for PW4000-94 engine, labyrinth-type honeycomb abradable seal material bonded to Inconel 625 carrier ring. Reduces interstage leakage to improve SFC.

MIL-W-22759/34 aerospace grade PTFE-insulated wire, 20 AWG silver-plated copper conductor for aircraft electrical systems. Temperature rating to 200Â°C, suitable for flight-critical wiring applications.
Boeing 777 outboard wing rib machined from 7150-T77511 aluminum alloy billet, complex multi-pocket geometry with lightening holes. Machined to AMS 2750 heat treatment specification.
Oil/gas buffer seal for CFM56-7B engine transfer gearbox, fluorocarbon rubber compound with integrated spring energizer. OEM-equivalent manufactured to SNECMA specifications.
Variable-displacement piston hydraulic pump for commercial transport aircraft, rated 3,000 psi at 37 GPM maximum flow. Features automatic pressure compensation and full-authority depressurization.
AN4-14A close-tolerance bolt, 1/4-28 UNF thread, shank length 7/8 inch, hex head, cadmium plated alloy steel per NAS standards. For primary structural attachment applications.
Combustion casing section with borescope inspection ports for GE90-115B engine, Inconel 718 investment casting with integrated cooling air manifold. FAA airworthiness release included.
EMI/RFI power line filter for aircraft avionics bay, MIL-STD-461 compliant with 100 dB attenuation at 1 MHz. Designed for 28 VDC aircraft bus, 50A continuous rating.
F-22 Raptor fuselage primary bulkhead structure, machined from titanium 6Al-4V, forms main wing-to-body carry-through interface. Export-controlled ITAR item requiring end-user certificate.
Composite fan blade for Rolls-Royce AE3007 turbofan engine, carbon fiber reinforced polymer with titanium leading edge erosion shield. Used in Embraer ERJ 145 regional jet applications.
shortDescription: AE3007 CFRP Fan Blade with Ti LE Shield

description: Transmitter/receiver module for AN/APG-68 multimode radar system installed in F-16 Fighting Falcon, solid-state pulsed coherent X-band design. MIL-STD-1553B compatible with BIT capability.
Integrated drive generator for commercial transport aircraft, constant-speed drive with 90 kVA three-phase AC output at 115/200 VAC 400 Hz. Used in Airbus A330 and Boeing 757 applications.
NAS1097 countersunk shear head rivet, 3/32 inch diameter, 2024-T4 aluminum alloy, package of 1000. For flush skin installation per NAS spec in aluminum airframe structures.
Fan frame assembly for GE CF34-10E turbofan engine, welded titanium and steel construction with integral bypass duct vanes and engine mount provisions. Includes all accessories and mounts.

Leading edge slat actuator for F/A-18 Hornet aircraft, hydraulic rotary actuator with integral position transducer and manual drive override. Drives outer wing slat panel through 30 degrees of travel.

Duplex angular contact ball bearing assembly for turbine main shaft thrust application, matched pair preloaded to class 7 with silicon nitride rolling elements. For Safran helicopter turboshaft applications.
Nickel-cadmium main aircraft battery, 28 VDC 44 Ah capacity for military and commercial aircraft emergency power. Sealed maintenance-free design with electronic charge controller.
Duplex fuel nozzle for Honeywell T55-GA-714A turboshaft engine used in CH-47 Chinook helicopter. Dual-orifice simplex design with heat shield, provides primary and secondary fuel atomization.
Ground spoiler panel assembly for Airbus A380 outer wing, carbon fiber composite construction with titanium hinge fittings. Provides aerodynamic braking and lift dumping on landing.
shortDescription: A380 Outer Wing Ground Spoiler CFRP

description: Parker Hannifin AS568-214 aerospace O-ring, fluorosilicone compound for hydraulic and fuel system applications. Temperature range -65Â°F to 400Â°F, suitable for phosphate ester hydraulic fluid.
Centrifugal compressor impeller for Pratt & Whitney PT6A-65B turboprop engine, titanium alloy two-stage design. Precision balanced to ISO G1 specification for smooth operation across flight envelope.
MIL-C-17/156 semi-rigid coaxial cable, RG-402 equivalent, 0.141 inch OD with 50 ohm characteristic impedance for microwave and RF applications up to 18 GHz. Outer conductor solid copper.

Forward-looking infrared sensor pod for combat aircraft targeting, third-generation cooled mercury cadmium telluride detector array with 640x480 resolution. Compatible with multiple aircraft MIL-STD-1760 interfaces.
Accessory gearbox for wide-body aircraft engine, drives hydraulic pumps, fuel control, IDG, and oil pump through multiple PTO pads. Magnesium housing with integral oil sump and filter.
Trent XWB engine nacelle inlet cowl assembly for Airbus A350, manufactured from carbon fiber honeycomb sandwich with de-icing bleed air passages. Includes inlet highlight and acoustic liner panels.
shortDescription: Trent XWB Nacelle Inlet Cowl A350

description: Tapered roller bearing single-row for aircraft wheel hub application, cup and cone assembly with high radial and axial load capacity. Per ABEC-5 tolerances with heat-stabilized steel.
shortDescription: Tapered Roller Bearing Wheel Hub ABEC-5

description: Tantalum electrolytic capacitor for avionics applications, 100 ÂµF 50 V, CLR79 military qualified per MIL-PRF-39003. Enhanced reliability screening with 100% thermal cycling.
Fan spinner cone assembly for GE/CFM LEAP-1B engine installed on Boeing 737 MAX, carbon fiber composite with titanium attachment bolts. Aerodynamically optimized for efficient airflow ingestion.
Fly-by-wire flight control electrohydrostatic actuator for B-2 Spirit bomber elevon surface, dual-redundant EHA with integrated LVDT position feedback. MIL-STD-704F power bus compatible.
Safety lockwire stainless steel 0.032 inch diameter, 1 lb spool per MS9226 specification. For use on critical aerospace fasteners requiring positive locking in high-vibration environments.
HPT turbine disk for Rolls-Royce Tay 650-15 engine used in Fokker 100 and Gulfstream IV, powder metallurgy nickel disk with broached fir-tree slots. Serviceable with current conformity release.
Active radar seeker head assembly for ESSM Block II missile, Ka-band monopulse design with digital signal processing and ARM-mode capability. Classified components require DD2345 certification.
shortDescription: ESSM Block II Active Radar Seeker

description: Torque sensor and signal conditioning unit for Honeywell HTF7000 turbofan FADEC power management, strain gauge bridge type with excitation and output electronics integrated. Â±0.1% accuracy.

Propeller hub assembly for C-130J Super Hercules six-blade composite propeller system, aluminum alloy forging with integral pitch change mechanism mounting provisions. Hamilton Sundstrand NP2000 compatible.
MIL-DTL-38999 Series III circular connector, 38-pin layout with EMI shielding backshell, cadmium-plated aluminum shell with bayonet coupling. Used in aircraft avionics and weapon systems.

Low-pressure shaft assembly for F135-PW-100 engine used in F-35 Lightning II, inertia welded Inconel and steel construction with precision spline coupling ends. ITAR-controlled, end-user certificate required.
Hydraulic system manifold block for Boeing 787 Dreamliner, titanium machined body with integrated check valves and pressure transducer ports. Operates at 5,000 psi system pressure.

PTFE gasket kit for aircraft hydraulic manifold and actuator servicing, includes 24 unique gasket sizes per MIL-G-21569 specification. Compatible with phosphate ester and petroleum-based hydraulic fluids.
